name: File or Folder Shared With an External Email Address
notes:
This rule triggers when a file or a folder is shared with non-corporate email address domains.

Note: The Corporate Email Domains reference set must be populated with the organization’s email domain.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Mail
when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Link Shared Events
when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: External Email Addresses
TD_list: APPLY File or Folder Shared With an External Email Address on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Mail
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Link Shared Events
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: External Email Addresses
RED_list: Event name: File or Folder Shared With an External Email Address
Event description: Detected a file or a folder that is shared with an email address outside of the company
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Username
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
